name: Leap
description: Reposition up to 3 tiles, ignoring obstacles.
gameHint: Combat utility — reposition before or after an attack on your turn.

name: Tongue Lash
gameHint: Your main damage button. Uses attack roll vs enemy AC.

name: Amphibious Rush
gameHint: Auto-buffs movement in rain and applies a combat edge when weather is wet.

name: Bufotoxin Spit
gameHint: Ranged poison hit — pairs with Fear Croak for control.

name: Fear Croak
gameHint: Enemy WIS save — on fail they may flee combat.

name: Burrow
gameHint: Defensive setup — flavor for slipping out of sight between turns.

name: Shell Block
gameHint: Tank button — roll when you expect a big hit incoming.

name: Withdraw
description: Immobile, attacks at disadvantage against you.
gameHint: Brace in place — enemies attack with disadvantage until you move again.

name: Ram
gameHint: Heavy melee hit — turtle/tortoise primary damage option.

name: Burrow Hide
description: Flatten into the undergrowth; attacks against you have disadvantage this round.
gameHint: Defensive — enemies have disadvantage attacking you until next turn.

name: Cheek Poultice
description: Restore 1d8+1 HP to whichever ally needs it most.
gameHint: Heals the most hurt ally on your side — ignores UI target quirk.

name: Nibble Distraction
description: WIS save or the target loses its next turn.
gameHint: Stun setup — WIS save or enemy skips their next turn.
